data.title: Backblaze named finalist in 2026 Tech Innovation CUBEd Awards for Most Innovative Data Storage. $BLZE delivers up to 1Tbps of sustained throughput.
data.description: In San Mateo, California, Backblaze, Inc. (Nasdaq: BLZE) has been selected as a finalist for the Most Innovative Data Storage Solution at the 2026 Tech Innovation CUBEd Awards by SiliconANGLE Media. The company's B2 Overdrive is transforming cloud object storage by removing the typical cost-performance trade-off. Offering unparalleled value, it achieves up to 1Tbps of sustained throughput, cementing its position as a leader in the industry.

data.title: ServiceNow beats Q4 estimates with $3.57B revenue, 92 cents EPS. Revenue up 20.5% YoY. Subscription revenue up 21%.
data.description: ServiceNow Inc (NYSE: NOW) released its fourth-quarter financial results, surpassing analyst expectations. The software company reported a revenue of around $3.57 billion, exceeding the consensus estimate of $3.53 billion. Their adjusted earnings for the quarter were 92 cents per share, higher than the anticipated 88 cents per share. Total revenue saw a 20.5% increase year-over-year, with Subscription revenue growing by 21%. ServiceNow disclosed remaining performance obligations of $28.2 billion at the end of the quarter, representing a 26.5% increase from the previous year. Furthermore, the company noted a rise in customers with over $5 million in annual contract value. ServiceNow stock is currently on an upward trend following these positive results. For the complete article, please visit the original source.

data.title: Murphy Oil provided a quarterly stockholder update, highlighting their fourth quarter of 2025. Important financial and operating highlights were discussed, excluding noncontrolling interest.
data.description: Houston-based Murphy Oil Corporation (NYSE: MUR) issued a letter to its stockholders regarding the fourth quarter of 2025. The letter serves as a supplement to their earnings release, providing forward-looking statements and non-GAAP financial information. Financial and operating highlights for the year exclude noncontrolling interest, with 2025 being a pivotal year for the company. Additional details can be found at the end of the letter.

data.title: Lam Research (NASDAQ: LRCX) beats Q2 estimates with $1.27 EPS (8.45% beat) and $5.35B revenue, up from $4.38B last year.
data.description: Shares of Lam Research Corp. (NASDAQ: LRCX) saw an increase in after-hours trading on Wednesday following the release of its second-quarter earnings report. The company outperformed analyst expectations, reporting quarterly earnings of $1.27 per share, surpassing the Street estimate of $1.17 by 8.45%. Quarterly revenue amounted to $5.35 billion, exceeding the analyst consensus estimate of $5.24 billion. This marked an increase from the previous quarter's revenue of $4.38 billion. For more details on LRCX stock movements and financial performance, check out the complete story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Greenberg Traurig advises Makarora on closing $2.1B acquisition of Plymouth Industrial REIT in all-cash deal.
data.description: On January 28, 2026, the multinational law firm Greenberg Traurig, LLP assisted Makarora Management LP, headquartered in New York, in finalizing the acquisition of Plymouth Industrial REIT, Inc. The transaction, conducted in partnership with Ares Alternative Credit funds, was an all-cash deal with a total value exceeding a significant amount.

data.title: Buenaventura (BVN) schedules Q4 2025 earnings call on Feb 27, 2026, 10:00 AM EST and Lima Time, led by CEO Leandro García Raggio.
data.description: LIMA, Peru -- Compañía de Minas Buenaventura S.A.A. (NYSE: BVN; Lima Stock Exchange: BUE.LM) has announced the scheduling of its Fourth Quarter 2025 earnings conference call on Friday, February 27, 2026, at 10:00 AM Eastern Time and 10:00 AM Lima Time. The call will include a review of Buenaventura’s financial and operating results for the fourth quarter of 2025 by Leandro García Raggio, the Chief Executive Officer, along with other senior management team members.

data.title: Fed Chair Powell defends independence amid gold rally and political pressure. Keeps rates at 3.5%-3.75%, emphasizes data-driven decisions.
data.description: Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell remains optimistic about the stability of the labor market, expressing patience in making decisions and emphasizing reliance on data to guide the central bank. The Federal Open Market Committee opted to maintain rates at 3.5%-3.75%. Powell resisted political pressure, affirming the Fed's independence and significance in economic stability. He distanced himself from political criticism and highlighted the Fed's decision-making transparency. Powell dismissed concerns over gold and silver price rallies and their impact on Fed credibility. Powell's recent Supreme Court appearance regarding a significant legal case in the Fed's history underlined the institution's commitment to public interest-focused decision-making. The full story is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Murphy Oil Corp reveals Q4 & full year 2025 results, 2026 guidance. Excludes NCI. Financials in $M.
data.description: In Houston, Murphy Oil Corporation (NYSE: MUR) revealed its financial and operational performance for the fourth quarter concluded on December 31, 2025. Along with this announcement, Murphy also distributed a Quarterly Stockholder Update. The financial and operational highlights and metrics discussed in the report exclude noncontrolling interest (NCI) unless specified otherwise. In the three-month period ending December 31, 2025, the company reported earnings in the millions of dollars, with specific figures omitted. The year-end statistics and volumes were also undisclosed in the report.
